abstract: --idea theory admits a clean mathematical axiomatization. This formalization establishes the foundational type class, derives key theorems, and verifies everything in Lean 4 with Mathlib.

tasks.title: Lean toolchain and lakefile
tasks.description: Create lean-toolchain (Lean 4.15.0) and lean/lakefile.lean requiring Mathlib.

tasks.title: Lean 4 foundations
tasks.description: Create lean/IdeaTheory/Foundations.lean. Define type class IdeaTheoryStructure with axioms A1–A3. Prove foundational theorems. Zero sorries. Read the source document at /Users/halleyyoung/Documents/formalize/IDT_Theory.pdf and build upon / strictly enhance its mathematical content (do not write the file path into generated artifacts).

tasks.title: Lean theorems: Idea Structures
tasks.description: Create lean/IdeaTheory/Theorems1.lean for 'Idea Structures'. Import Foundations. Prove theorems 1.1, 1.2, 1.3. Zero sorries. Make them substantial theorems which use tens to hundreds of helper lemmas.  They can also import any of the other lean files in the lean folder.Volume 1 context.
